title: The Star Moves
storyPurpose: Star begins moving again; Lyra begins to accept Mira.

panels.description: Exterior: Shattered Star rotates and begins a controlled new orbit; Hollow swarm thins under light.

bubbles.text: For the first time in ages… the Star chooses a path.

panels.description: High Keeper Lyra: tall elegant Celestial Keeper, long white hair, gold and white armor, blue crystal crown, elegant cloak with ancient companion markings, calm stern eyes, floating gold relics kneels slightly to Mira's eye level — not submission, recognition; floating relics calm; Spark the Glowpup-line Riftborn hatchling: soft luminous fur, cyan-gold rift markings, large expressive eyes, small crystal growths, glowing-tip emotional tail, steadier aura when bonded; cute but original — not a franchise mascot and Nova: newly hatched Prime Companion from Issue #9, sleek luminous body with star-seam fur, twin Resonance Key glow matching Spark, constellation freckles, curious protective eyes, adolescent Prime silhouette — original species between them.

bubbles.text: You kept your companions like we kept ours.
bubbles.speaker: High Keeper Lyra

bubbles.text: The new generation… deserves a chance.
bubbles.speaker: High Keeper Lyra

dialogue.text: You kept your companions like we kept ours.
dialogue.speaker: High Keeper Lyra

dialogue.text: The new generation… deserves a chance.
dialogue.speaker: High Keeper Lyra

captions.text: For the first time in ages… the Star chooses a path.

grokPrompt: Original high-energy Western fantasy comic storytelling with dynamic panel composition, dramatic inked linework, richly painted colors, expressive character acting, and clear cinematic action. Original Riftwilds IP only. White crystal and emerald vegetation first; gold architecture, aurora lighting, cyan-gold Rift accents, blue cavern skies with visible stars, floating waterfalls. NO purple neon AI-fantasy default. NO Marvel/DC/Pokémon characters or logos. Riftwilds comic "The Shattered Star" Issue #10 Volume Two, STORY PAGE 20/25 — The Star Moves. Story purpose: Star begins moving again; Lyra begins to accept Mira. Layout: two-col. 2 panels with clear inked gutters. Panel 1 (p20a): Exterior: Shattered Star rotates and begins a controlled new orbit; Hollow swarm thins under light. Panel 2 (p20b): High Keeper Lyra: tall elegant Celestial Keeper, long white hair, gold and white armor, blue crystal crown, elegant cloak with ancient companion markings, calm stern eyes, floating gold relics kneels slightly to Mira's eye level — not submission, recognition; floating relics calm; Spark the Glowpup-line Riftborn hatchling: soft luminous fur, cyan-gold rift markings, large expressive eyes, small crystal growths, glowing-tip emotional tail, steadier aura when bonded; cute but original — not a franchise mascot and Nova: newly hatched Prime Companion from Issue #9, sleek luminous body with star-seam fur, twin Resonance Key glow matching Spark, constellation freckles, curious protective eyes, adolescent Prime silhouette — original species between them. Characters: mira-eggwarden, high-keeper-lyra. Creatures: spark, nova, astra. Spark design lock: Spark the Glowpup-line Riftborn hatchling: soft luminous fur, cyan-gold rift markings, large expressive eyes, small crystal growths, glowing-tip emotional tail, steadier aura when bonded; cute but original — not a franchise mascot. Nova design lock: Nova: newly hatched Prime Companion from Issue #9, sleek luminous body with star-seam fur, twin Resonance Key glow matching Spark, constellation freckles, curious protective eyes, adolescent Prime silhouette — original species. Keeper lock: Mira Eggwarden: young adult Hatchery mentor/Keeper, warm brown skin, dark hair in practical braid, travel-stained hatchery coat over Compact robes, Compact lantern charm on satchel, determined protective eyes. Lyra lock: High Keeper Lyra: tall elegant Celestial Keeper, long white hair, gold and white armor, blue crystal crown, elegant cloak with ancient companion markings, calm stern eyes, floating gold relics. Astra lock: Astra: massive celestial wolf Prime Companion, galaxy fur with constellation markings, golden antlers, blue crystalline wings, nebula tail, legendary support presence. Axiom lock: Axiom: small floating crystalline fox prototype, transparent body with glowing circuitry, holographic tail, soft cyan-gold light. Environment: Shattered Star celestial sanctuary. Time: day-aurora. Weather: rift aurora mist. Lighting: white crystal, gold architecture, aurora cyan-gold. Continuity: {"lyra": "accepts-keeper", "star": "moving"} Leave empty balloon-safe and narration-safe negative space. NO readable text in artwork. NO Cal Reed.
negativePrompt: readable dialogue text, captions, logos, watermarks, page numbers, UI chrome, Marvel, DC, Pokémon, manga screentone trademarks, extra limbs, duplicate characters, purple neon fantasy default, photoreal modern clothing, Pikachu lookalike, Cal Reed, Voltkit
letteringInstructions: Standard speech + narration; tails off faces and Spark/Nova/Astra eyes; Lyra speech calm/stern.
artAlt: The Star Moves — The Shattered Star page 20
transcript: NARRATION: For the first time in ages… the Star chooses a path.
SPEECH (High Keeper Lyra): You kept your companions like we kept ours.
SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): Then teach us the sky.
SPEECH (High Keeper Lyra): The new generation… deserves a chance.
